summary.en: LED luminaires and LED drivers that are electrical or electronic products supplied in Australia must meet ACMA product compliance rules before supply. The mandatory obligation is the ACMA regulatory framework for regulated electrical products, including labelling and compliance-record duties where applicable; AS/NZS CISPR 15 is the common EMC emissions standard for electrical lighting and similar equipment. The supplier must hold compliance evidence, make a supplier declaration where required, and apply the RCM when the product is subject to ACMA labelling rules.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的 LED 灯具和 LED 驱动器，如属于电气或电子产品，须在供应前满足 ACMA 产品合规规则。强制义务来自 ACMA 对受管电气产品的监管框架，包括适用时的标识及合规记录义务；AS/NZS CISPR 15 是电气照明及类似设备常用的 EMC 发射标准。供应商须保存合规证据，在要求时作出供应商声明，并在产品受 ACMA 标识规则约束时加贴 RCM。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的 LED 燈具和 LED 驅動器，如屬於電氣或電子產品，須在供應前滿足 ACMA 產品合規規則。強制義務來自 ACMA 對受管電氣產品的監管框架，包括適用時的標識及合規記錄義務；AS/NZS CISPR 15 是電氣照明及類似設備常用的 EMC 發射標準。供應商須保存合規證據，在要求時作出供應商聲明，並在產品受 ACMA 標識規則約束時加貼 RCM。

standards_or_laws: ACMA product compliance regulation for electrical products
AS/NZS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 17743 for radio disturbance limits for electrical lighting and similar equipment, alongside CCC or voluntary certification depending on the product category. Chinese EMC reports may be based on CISPR 15 but normally do not replace ACMA compliance records, Australian supplier declarations, or RCM labelling responsibilities.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用 GB/T 17743 处理电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰限值，并视产品类别适用 CCC 或自愿认证。中国 EMC 报告可能以 CISPR 15 为基础，但通常不能替代 ACMA 合规记录、澳大利亚供应商声明或 RCM 标识责任。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用 GB/T 17743 處理電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾限值，並視產品類別適用 CCC 或自願認證。中國 EMC 報告可能以 CISPR 15 為基礎，但通常不能替代 ACMA 合規記錄、澳洲供應商聲明或 RCM 標識責任。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment

gap.en: Australian ACMA compliance is supplier-based. The importer must retain records showing the exact model and configuration tested to the applicable AS/NZS CISPR 15 edition, including driver, dimming, wireless control, cable length, and worst-case modes. A China GB/T 17743 report should be checked for edition equivalence, laboratory competence, model identity, Australian voltage/frequency, and whether it supports the required ACMA declaration.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚 ACMA 合规以供应商为责任主体。进口商须保存记录，证明精确型号和配置已按适用 AS/NZS CISPR 15 版本测试，包括驱动器、调光、无线控制、电缆长度及最不利工作模式。中国 GB/T 17743 报告应核查版本等效性、实验室能力、型号一致性、澳大利亚电压/频率及是否支持所需 ACMA 声明。
gap.zht: 澳洲 ACMA 合規以供應商為責任主體。進口商須保存記錄，證明精確型號和配置已按適用 AS/NZS CISPR 15 版本測試，包括驅動器、調光、無線控制、電纜長度及最不利工作模式。中國 GB/T 17743 報告應核查版本等效性、實驗室能力、型號一致性、澳洲電壓/頻率及是否支持所需 ACMA 聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ACMA compliance, records, declaration and RCM labelling duties apply where the product is regulated; AS/NZS CISPR 15 is the common technical route for lighting EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Product-dependent — GB/T 17743 EMC evidence is commonly used; CCC or voluntary certification depends on the Chinese product category

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ACMA EMC obligations are separate from EESS electrical safety and from China CCC. Maintain Australian supplier compliance records and AS/NZS CISPR 15 evidence before applying the RCM for regulated lighting equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ACMA EMC 义务独立于 EESS 电气安全及中国 CCC。对受管照明设备加贴 RCM 前，应保存澳大利亚供应商合规记录及 AS/NZS CISPR 15 证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ACMA EMC 義務獨立於 EESS 電氣安全及中國 CCC。對受管照明設備加貼 RCM 前，應保存澳洲供應商合規記錄及 AS/NZS CISPR 15 證據。
